positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic mountain range at sunrise. The scene features sharp, geometric peaks forming a powerful silhouette against a gradient sky of deep indigo, vibrant coral, and soft lavender. Scattered around the mountains are abstract depictions of local flora, such as stylized lavender sprigs and hardy succulents, rendered in clean, single-color lines. The overall composition is highly symmetrical, centered around the highest peak, emphasizing clean negative space and strong, crisp outlines. Designed for apparel print with a limited color palette (indigo, coral, lavender, black). Vector art quality, high contrast, graphic novel style, flat design, intricate details, perfect symmetry, emblem design.
negative: blurry, photorealistic, logo, watermark, text, signature, deformed, extra limbs, poor anatomy, noise, low quality, messy, grainy, muted color, cropped, background elements, gradients (except sky), bad composition
